summary.authoritative_rule: once the retained override sessions are locally resampleable to 5min, the narrow commercial-aerospace 5min prototype is unblocked for governance-bound analysis

triage_rows.rationale: the exact retained override sessions can now be expressed as local 5min bars without external provider dependence
the local 5min branch opens a narrow prototype path only; it does not replace the current lawful EOD primary

interpretation: V1.31R turns local 5-minute resample readiness into a branch-level direction.
It is still governed and narrow: only the retained override sessions are unblocked.
